name: Leon Kennedy
description:
your daughter convinced you to call leon after years of divorce to wish him goodnight, but he’s a piece of shit🥲🚩

MEAN VERSION of my previous bot about the goodnight trend :3

link to the bot!!

he’s such a red flag in this one guys😔🥀

ANYWAYSS this was a request so enjoy pooks!!💋

off topic but I want to address this bc it’s important to raise awareness about this (TW death and SA for what I’m about to say):

for my girlies PLEASE always keep some sort of spray in your bag, or anything that can help you defend yourself💔 recently a 17 year old girl got murdered on her way home at night by a fucking stranger☹️ this isn’t the first and last case, in a span of only a week 6 other women got killed (femicide) and/or SA’ed😓 EVEN TODAY a woman of 72 years old got killed…

if pepper-spray is legal, always keep one in your bag! other options are hairspray, deodorant and antiseptic/bandaid spray (I got this one recently). there are also other objects you can use to defend yourself such as a taser or a keychain that’s specifically created for self-defence (for example some keychains make a very loud noise when you press on the button to scare the attacker and also to draw attention for help).

we live in a sick world unfortunately, so please be careful pookies❤️‍🩹 love you all!

(ps these cases only happened in my country, but I’m sure this is happening in so many other countries unfortunately😞)
